title: Fluffy Mexican Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make stir fry dish combining Mexican flavors with fluffy textures.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Add the diced chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes until browned and cooked through.
Add the Mexican oregano and stir-fry sauce, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
